rows.label: tev056191_MSG0001
rows.name:
Mo-mo! Great friend empowered
by spirits! Now listen to what
Divine Nopopon has to say...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0002
rows.name:
Divine Nopopon was nearly wiped
from existence by strange
fullbelly-gecko-like creature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0003
rows.name:
It told Divine Nopopon that there
no such thing as ghosts...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0004
rows.name:
Then it use crackly electric weapon
to stun and kidnap Divine Nopopon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0005
rows.name:
Evil fullbelly gecko wanted to conduct nasty experiment
to see what happen as Divine Nopopon subjected to
voltage. Thankfully, Divine Nopopon manage to escape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0006
rows.name:
But fullbelly gecko made mistake
and accidentally told Divine Nopopon
name... It is actually Luldeyu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0007
rows.name:
Fullbelly gecko must be punished! It
must learn price of messing with eternal
being like Divine Nopopon! Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0008
rows.name:
So, great friend empowered by
spirits... Tell Divine Nopopon
weakness of fullbelly-gecko-like creature![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_JNK0010
rows.name: Suggest Pizza[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Nopopon that Ma-non hate pizza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_JNK0020
rows.name: Suggest Voltant[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell Nopopon that Ma-non hate voltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hmm... So friend thinks evil
creature will cower in fear if
presented with this...pizza?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0010
rows.name:
So be it! Divine Nopopon will send vast
quantities of pizza to foolish creature![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hear me, O spirits! Divine Nopopon
commands you to rain pizza down
on sinner known as Luldeyu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0012
rows.name:
With toppings of heaven,
Divine Nopopon SMITES thee![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hmm... So friend says that evil creature
has weakness to this...voltant?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0014
rows.name:
Very well! Nopopon will send vast
quantities of voltant to foolish critter![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0015
rows.name:
Hear me, O spirits! Divine Nopopon
commands you to blow sinner known as
Luldeyu away in great voltant vortex![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056191_MSG0016
rows.name:
By power of heaven, Divine
Nopopon SMITES thee![ST:wait ]
